center.name: 索科特拉岛
center.summary: 索科特拉岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Forbes-Watson's swift、Socotra buzzard，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in coastal areas of Somalia and the southern Arabian Peninsula and on the island of Socotra

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: As its name implies, it is native to the island of Socotra, Yemen. Although it is listed as vulnerable in the IUCN Red List, its population is considered to be stable
